recommendations.title: Killer
recommendations.overview: An innocent cab driver is mistaken for a contract killer and imprisoned. Soon, he is sprung by a mob boss who needs a "killer" for a few more jobs.

recommendations.title: Killer 2
recommendations.overview: Jurek Kiler has become a VIP - sponsoring the Polish government, playing tennis with the President, meeting world leaders. He must oversee a transfer of a substantial amount of gold. However, in his past activities, he has made enemies. Mighty ones.

recommendations.title: Sexmission
recommendations.overview: Two scientists are chosen as guinea pigs for a time experiment: they are placed in hibernation and should be brought back to life after three years. In the meantime, however, World War III breaks out and life has been wiped off the surface of Earth.

recommendations.title: The Heist of the Century
recommendations.overview: In 2006, a group of thieves performed what is considered one of the most famous and smart bank heists in the history of Argentina. How they robbed the Rio bank is as surprising as what happened afterwards. This is their story.

recommendations.title: Scorched
recommendations.overview: Three mischievous employees of a bank in a small deserted town all make plans to rob it at the same time, however none of them knows about the others.

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.

recommendations.title: Flag Day
recommendations.overview: A father lives a double life as a counterfeiter, bank robber and con man in order to provide for his daughter.

recommendations.title: Take the Money and Run
recommendations.overview: Virgil Starkwell is intent on becoming a notorious bank robber. Unfortunately for Virgil and his not-so-budding career, he is completely incompetent.

recommendations.title: Two Men in Town
recommendations.overview: A former bank robber is released after 10 years in prison. He gets help from a social-worker, but gets harassed by an old cop from his past.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.
